name: spec-gen
description: Spec Generation tier: interrogate raw intent into a product-approvable Spec plus a complete Verification Manifest by walking the manifest schema as a question tree — refusing to finalize while any completeness rule fails. An interrogator, not a generator (silence is impossible on the straight-through path). Two-attacker adversarial round before any human sees the skeleton (ADR 0002); the only path to a confirmed-CORE entry is a human answer. Ships a vendored byte-identical manifest validator plus deterministic ID-allocation, resume-projection, profile-resolution, and emission-shape helpers, all covered by a hermetic uv-bootstrapped self-test.
